title: Dog Day Evening
synopsis: On an usual day, something unusual happens in a paid TV station… Dak bursts into the customer service department and taking hostages. It turns out Dak doesn’t want money but to “terminate the TV subscription service”, while Inspector Shan suspects Dak may be a terrorist in disguise and is ready to deploy the SWAT team… The hostages understand that the cancellation procedure is complicated, and turns out helping Dak by calling hotlines and filling forms. Dak loses his patience and demands to speak to the Boss of the TV company, and the incident ends very unexpectedly.

synopsis_lang.en: On an usual day, something unusual happens in a paid TV station… Dak bursts into the customer service department and taking hostages. It turns out Dak doesn’t want money but to “terminate the TV subscription service”, while Inspector Shan suspects Dak may be a terrorist in disguise and is ready to deploy the SWAT team… The hostages understand that the cancellation procedure is complicated, and turns out helping Dak by calling hotlines and filling forms. Dak loses his patience and demands to speak to the Boss of the TV company, and the incident ends very unexpectedly.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
電視大樓運作如常，員工忙碌如常。這天，卻不太尋常…
德仔激動闖進客戶服務部，脅持人質，原來並非為錢，只是想「cut台」，終止月費服務…
總督察山姐不信綁匪真的為了如此小事而犯事。緊張大師，煞有介事，隨時出動飛虎…
「Cut台」程序出名繁複，一眾人質幫忙打熱線、走流程，德仔忍無可忍，要求會見電視台老闆談判！
老闆掙扎，山姐苦惱，眾人情緒瀕臨爆煲，鬧劇終將迎來荒唐結局…

cast: Michael Ning, Mak Pui Tung, Rachel Leung, Tai Yuk Ki

cast_lang.en: Michael Ning, Mak Pui Tung, Rachel Leung, Tai Yuk Ki
cast_lang.zh_hk: 白只、麥沛東、梁雍婷、戴玉麒

subtitle: Chinese,English
